codeReview.summary: The fix changes fetchLiveNews() so the normal no-query path now calls getDefaultQueryProfiles(), activating the combined base, region, and language profile set in production. The added regression test covers the exact fallback path and asserts the 25-profile combined set still includes sourcecountry: and sourcelang: operators.

summary: Pass. The original dead-code gap is closed: default ingestion now uses the advanced regional and language-targeted GDELT profiles, and the regression test protects the behavior.
